101.headline: Lakers close late against Boston
101.summary: Los Angeles leaned on a fourth-quarter run to separate from Boston after a tight three-quarter game. The final stretch swung on second-chance points and a cleaner half-court offense.
notes: Lakers finished on a 12-4 run.
Boston won the paint battle but lost the turnover margin.
Playoff-style pace in the second half.

102.headline: Thunder push the tempo in a live West battle
102.summary: Oklahoma City has generated early offense off misses while Golden State has kept contact with half-court shooting. The closing stretch is set up for a guard-driven finish.
notes: Thunder lead transition scoring.
Warriors are ahead from deep through three quarters.
Game pace remains high entering the fourth.

103.headline: Knicks edge Miami in crunch time
103.summary: New York controlled the glass late and executed better in the last two minutes to hold off Miami. The final possessions were decided by rebounding and free throws.
notes: Knicks won the rebounding margin late.
Miami cut it to one twice in the fourth.
New York closed with eight straight made free throws.

106.headline: Star creators headline tomorrow's West matchup
106.summary: Denver hosts Dallas in a half-court heavy meeting that should turn on pace control, defensive rebounding, and late-clock execution.
notes: Denver enters with home-court advantage.
Dallas will try to flatten the game into late-clock possessions.
Watch the turnover battle in the opening quarter.

107.headline: Central contenders meet in Milwaukee
107.summary: Milwaukee and Cleveland bring contrasting tempos into a matchup that should reward the team that owns the glass and protects the rim.
notes: Milwaukee hosts the second night of a back-to-back stand.
Cleveland's defense will test the Bucks at the nail.
Expect a physical game inside.

108.headline: Length and pace collide in Minneapolis
108.summary: Minnesota's size meets Memphis' pressure in a game that could swing on who creates cleaner paint touches without giving away transition chances.
notes: Minnesota will try to own the glass.
Memphis wants to create extra possessions.
Half-court shot quality could decide it.

109.headline: Late-week spotlight game in Los Angeles
109.summary: Oklahoma City visits Los Angeles for a marquee late-night window, with primary creation and transition defense likely deciding the matchup.
notes: Thunder aim to pressure the ball early.
Lakers will look for paint pressure and foul-line volume.
Bench scoring could swing the second quarter.
